records.question: Which addresses are linked to both staff and customers who became customers exactly on 2016-02-17 08:26:23?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT addresses.address_id FROM addresses
JOIN staff ON addresses.address_id = staff.staff_address_id
JOIN customers ON addresses.address_id = customers.customer_address_id
WHERE customers.date_became_customer = '2016-02-17 08:26:23'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT a.address_id
FROM Addresses a
JOIN Staff s ON a.address_id = s.staff_address_id
JOIN Customers c ON a.address_id = c.customer_address_id
WHERE c.date_became_customer = '2016-02-17 08:26:23'
GROUP BY a.address_id

records.question: Where are the addresses linked to customers named Koelpin who were born on 1996-11-07 05:30:55, have email mayert.judy@example.com, owe at most 8144.0, and are served by staff whose middle name is Clarabelle?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT addresses.address_id FROM addresses
JOIN staff ON addresses.address_id = staff.staff_address_id
JOIN customers ON addresses.address_id = customers.customer_address_id
WHERE customers.date_of_birth = '1996-11-07 05:30:55' AND staff.middle_name = 'Clarabelle' AND customers.last_name = 'Koelpin' AND customers.amount_outstanding <= 8144.0 AND customers.email_address = 'mayert.judy@example.com'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT a.address_id
FROM Addresses a
JOIN Customers c ON a.address_id = c.customer_address_id
JOIN Lessons l ON c.customer_id = l.customer_id
JOIN Staff s ON l.staff_id = s.staff_id
WHERE c.last_name = 'Koelpin'
  AND c.date_of_birth = '1996-11-07 05:30:55'
  AND c.email_address = 'mayert.judy@example.com'
  AND (c.amount_outstanding <= 8144.0 OR c.amount_outstanding IS NULL)
  AND s.middle_name = 'Clarabelle'
